title: Red Kenyan Cabbage Braise
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring red cabbage from Kenya, cooked in a ttukbaegi earthenware pot. Perfect for a solo dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a ttukbaegi earthenware pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the ground ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chopped red cabbage and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the salt, black pepper, coconut oil, and water, then stir to combine.
Braise the cabbage mixture, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the cabbage is tender.
Remove the pot from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Serve the Red Kenyan Cabbage Braise hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro, if desired.
